summary: All 17 smoke checks passed. All 9 tech-spec acceptance criteria met. All 15 user-spec acceptance criteria met. All 19 markdown reference links resolve to existing files. No critical or high unresolved audit findings. Feature is ready for deploy.

smoke_checks.command: two-layer mentions in all 4 design skills

tech_spec_criteria.criterion: All 5 modified SKILL.md files pass structural validation: phases numbered correctly, checkpoints present, no orphaned references
tech_spec_criteria.evidence: All 19 reference links resolve. Phase counts match expectations. Checkpoints present in each phase.

tech_spec_criteria.criterion: New reference links use correct relative paths (../../shared/design-references/)
tech_spec_criteria.evidence: All links from skills/ use ../../shared/design-references/ prefix and resolve correctly.

tech_spec_criteria.criterion: style-profiles.md follows existing reference file format: Russian language, structured sections, concrete values, quick-lookup table
tech_spec_criteria.evidence: 8 H2 sections (7 profiles + lookup), Russian text, concrete design techniques per profile.

tech_spec_criteria.criterion: designer-experience.md uses append-only section structure with dated entries
tech_spec_criteria.evidence: File contains 'append-only' format instruction. 4 category sections with subsections.

tech_spec_criteria.criterion: taste-profile template in design-retrospective includes all required sections
tech_spec_criteria.evidence: Template includes: Цветовые предпочтения, Типографика, Стиль и смелость, Антипаттерны, История изменений.

tech_spec_criteria.criterion: design-retrospective Phase 4.5 handles edge cases: missing/corrupted taste-profile, missing designer-experience, missing category section
tech_spec_criteria.evidence: Grep confirms corrupted/повреждён/пересозда keywords present. Phase 4.5 includes create-if-missing and recreate-if-corrupted logic.

tech_spec_criteria.criterion: code-writing conditional step lists UI file extensions and specifies silent skip
tech_spec_criteria.evidence: Extensions .tsx, .vue, .html, .css, .scss listed. 'silent skip' behavior explicitly stated.

tech_spec_criteria.criterion: No existing phases, checkpoints, or reference links removed
tech_spec_criteria.evidence: All 6 phases in design-generate preserved. Original links in all SKILL.md files intact. Phase 4.5 added without removing existing phases.

tech_spec_criteria.criterion: Two-layer description instruction: human-readable first, then technical; design-review optional
tech_spec_criteria.evidence: All 4 design skills contain two-layer/двухслойн instructions. design-review marks it as 'Non-obvious matches' only (optional).

user_spec_criteria.criterion: design-retrospective создаёт/обновляет taste-profile.md с секциями: цветовые предпочтения, типографика, стиль, уровень смелости, антипаттерны
user_spec_criteria.evidence: Phase 4.5 with template containing all required sections confirmed.

user_spec_criteria.criterion: design-generate Phase 0 содержит шаг чтения taste-profile.md
user_spec_criteria.evidence: Phase 0 step 3 reads taste-profile.md with graceful degradation.
Update flow includes taste-profile reading instruction.

user_spec_criteria.criterion: designer-experience.md создан с 4 категориями и правильной структурой
user_spec_criteria.evidence: 4 H2 sections (Landing, Webapp, Admin, Portfolio) with subsections.

user_spec_criteria.criterion: design-system-init читает секцию по категории проекта

user_spec_criteria.evidence: Phase 4.5 Experience section appends to designer-experience.md.
8 H2 headers counted, 7 style profiles confirmed.

user_spec_criteria.criterion: design-system-init подбирает стилевой профиль по mood+category
user_spec_criteria.evidence: Step 4 reads matching style-profile section using Quick Lookup table.
Two-layer mentions found in all 4: init(1), generate(3), review(1), retrospective(1).

user_spec_criteria.criterion: code-writing Phase 1.2: если tokens.json + UI → читать токены
user_spec_criteria.evidence: Conditional step in Phase 1 step 2 with dual condition check.
'silent skip, proceed without tokens' instruction confirmed.
Phase 4.5 handles corrupted file with recreate + user warning.
design-system-init: 'Если секция пуста или файл отсутствует — продолжить без неё'.

user_spec_criteria.criterion: Нет регрессии: все существующие фазы и чекпоинты сохранены
user_spec_criteria.evidence: All original phases preserved. Phase counts match expected values.

task_8_code_audit.notes: 1 medium (design-review activation clarity) — recommendation, not blocker. Low/info items are terminology consistency.

task_9_security_audit.notes: 1 medium (prompt injection via append-only experience) — theoretical risk, recommendation to add 'read as reference data' note. Low/info items are defensive suggestions.

task_10_test_audit.notes: 3 medium items suggest deeper smoke checks for tasks 3, 7, and reference resolution. All are test depth improvements, not functional gaps.
